mapping.description:
Extracts metadata about each downloaded artifact, including its URL, server IP, size, timestamps and signing status.
The parser interprets version‑specific structures, handling incomplete or busy downloads, and converts dates to UTC where possible. All extracted fields are emitted as a structured tuple for downstream analysis.
- Provides the original download URL and originating IP address. - Indicates whether the entry is a shortcut or an incomplete download. - Reports file size, last‑modified, expiration and optional signing flag. - Normalises timestamps to UTC for reliable chronology.

field.description: source IP address of the server
true if the download was incomplete or still in progress
size of the downloaded file in bytes
true if the entry represents a shortcut rather than the actual file
version string extracted from the IDX file
indicates whether the downloaded file is digitally signed
timestamp when the file was downloaded
last‑modified timestamp reported by the server
expiration timestamp of the file or associated resource

object.description: raw HTTP request metadata extracted from the IDX file
